title: Battle of Ryloth (disambiguation)
content:
Throughout its history, the planet [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] has experienced several battles, including the following:

==Canon==
===[[Clone Wars]]===
*[[Battle of Ryloth]] from [[22 BBY]] to [[21 BBY]]

===[[First Order-Resistance War]]===
*[[Attack on Ryloth]] of [[34 ABY]]

==Legends==
===[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]===
:*[[Battle of Ryloth/Legends|Battle of Ryloth]] of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]
:*[[Battle of Ryloth (Outer Rim Sieges)|Battle of Ryloth]] of [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]; part of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
:*[[Battle of Ryloth (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Ryloth]]

===[[Diversity Alliance]] Crisis===
:*[[Battle of Ryloth (Diversity Alliance Crisis)|Battle of Ryloth]]
